Name: CSA Cloud Controls Matrix v4.0 for Microsoft Azure
Description: TitanGuard custom mapping of CSA CCM v4.0 controls to Prowler Azure security checks. Generated by mapping Azure C5, CIS, and native Azure checks to CSA CCM control domains.

Requirements.Description: Identity and Access Management Policy and Procedures - Establish, document, approve, communicate, apply, evaluate and maintain policies and procedures for the management of identity and access.
Access Control - Establish, document, approve, communicate, apply, evaluate and maintain a user access request and granting process.
Access Control - Establish, document, approve, communicate, apply, evaluate and maintain mechanisms and processes for granting access requests.
Separation of Duties - Employ the separation of duties principle when implementing information system access.
Least Privilege - Employ the least privilege principle when implementing information system access.
User Access Provisioning - Define and implement a user access provisioning process which authorizes, records and communicates access rights.
User Access Review - Define and implement a user access review process to review and revoke access rights.
System Access Authentication - Implement strong authentication controls for system access.
Identity Management - Establish, document, approve, communicate, apply, evaluate and maintain identity management processes.
Identity Repository - Establish, document, approve, communicate, apply, evaluate and maintain identity repositories.
Authentication Information - Establish, document, approve, communicate, apply, evaluate and manage authentication information.
Authentication Credentials - Establish, document, approve, communicate, apply, evaluate and manage authentication credentials.
Password Policy - Establish, document, approve, communicate, apply, evaluate and maintain password policies.
Password Management - Implement strong password management controls.
Password Reset - Implement secure password reset mechanisms.
Password Expiration - Implement password expiration policies.
Logging and Monitoring Policy and Procedures - Establish, document, approve, communicate, apply, evaluate and maintain policies and procedures for the logging and monitoring of activities.
Audit Logs Protection - Define, implement and evaluate processes, procedures and technical measures to ensure the security and integrity of audit logs.
Audit Log Retention - Define and implement audit log retention policies.
Audit Log Generation - Ensure audit logs are generated for all relevant activities.
Audit Log Review - Define and implement audit log review procedures.
Audit Log Storage - Ensure audit logs are stored securely.
Audit Log Access Control - Implement access controls for audit logs.
Audit Log Integrity - Ensure audit logs cannot be tampered with.
Audit Log Backup - Implement audit log backup procedures.
Real-time Monitoring - Implement real-time monitoring and alerting.
Security Event Monitoring - Monitor security events.
Log Analysis - Implement log analysis capabilities.
Log Aggregation - Aggregate logs from multiple sources.
Threat and Vulnerability Management Policy and Procedures - Establish, document, approve, communicate, apply, evaluate and maintain policies and procedures for threat and vulnerability management.
Vulnerability Scanning - Implement vulnerability scanning procedures.
Vulnerability Remediation - Implement vulnerability remediation procedures.
Threat Detection - Implement threat detection capabilities.
Threat Response - Implement threat response procedures.
Malware Protection - Implement malware protection measures.
Intrusion Detection - Implement intrusion detection capabilities.
Vulnerability Assessment - Conduct regular vulnerability assessments.
Penetration Testing - Conduct penetration testing.
Security Baselines - Establish and maintain security baselines.
Cryptography Policy and Procedures - Establish, document, approve, communicate, apply, evaluate and maintain cryptography policies and procedures.
Roles and Responsibilities - Define and implement roles and responsibilities for cryptography.
Data Encryption - Implement data encryption at rest and in transit.
Encryption Algorithms - Use strong encryption algorithms.
Key Management - Implement secure key management processes.
Key Generation - Generate encryption keys securely.
Key Distribution - Distribute encryption keys securely.
Key Storage - Store encryption keys securely.
Key Rotation - Implement key rotation procedures.
Key Destruction - Implement secure key destruction procedures.
Key Backup - Implement key backup procedures.
Key Recovery - Implement key recovery procedures.
Key Escrow - Implement key escrow procedures.
Key Archiving - Archive encryption keys.
Key Usage - Define and implement key usage policies.
Key Access Control - Implement key access controls.
Key Audit Trail - Maintain key audit trails.
Key Inventory - Maintain an inventory of encryption keys.
Key Compromise - Implement key compromise response procedures.
Key Recovery Testing - Test key recovery procedures.
Key Disposal - Dispose of encryption keys securely.

Off-Site Equipment Disposal Policy and Procedures - Establish, document, approve, communicate, apply, evaluate and maintain policies and procedures for the secure disposal of equipment used outside the cloud service provider's facilities.
Physical Access Control - Implement physical access controls.
Environmental Controls - Implement environmental controls.
Fire Suppression - Implement fire suppression systems.
Power Supply - Ensure reliable power supply.
Network Security - Implement network security controls.
Network Segmentation - Implement network segmentation.
Network Monitoring - Monitor network traffic.
Network Access Control - Implement network access controls.
Network Device Management - Manage network devices securely.
Network Firewall - Implement network firewalls.
Cabling Security - Secure network cabling.
Equipment Maintenance - Maintain equipment securely.
Equipment Disposal - Dispose of equipment securely.
Shipping and Receiving - Secure shipping and receiving processes.
Business Continuity Policy and Procedures - Establish, document, approve, communicate, apply, evaluate and maintain business continuity policies and procedures.
Risk Assessment and Impact Analysis - Conduct risk assessments and impact analysis.
Business Continuity Strategy - Establish business continuity strategies.
Business Continuity Testing - Test business continuity procedures.
Backup and Recovery - Implement backup and recovery procedures.
Disaster Recovery - Implement disaster recovery procedures.
Alternative Processing Sites - Establish alternative processing sites.
Communication and Notification - Establish communication and notification procedures.
Business Continuity Plan Updates - Update business continuity plans regularly.
Business Continuity Training - Provide business continuity training.
Business Continuity Plan Documentation - Document business continuity plans.
Data Security Policy and Procedures - Establish, document, approve, communicate, apply, evaluate and maintain data security policies and procedures.
Data Classification - Classify data based on sensitivity.
Data Handling - Handle data securely.
Data Transfer - Transfer data securely.
Data Storage - Store data securely.
Data Access Control - Implement data access controls.
Data Retention - Implement data retention policies.
Data Disposal - Dispose of data securely.
Data Leakage Prevention - Implement data leakage prevention measures.
Data Masking - Implement data masking.
Data Encryption in Transit - Encrypt data in transit.
Data Encryption at Rest - Encrypt data at rest.
Data Integrity - Ensure data integrity.
Data Backup - Backup data regularly.
Data Recovery - Implement data recovery procedures.
Data Privacy - Protect personal data.
Data Breach Notification - Implement data breach notification procedures.
Data Privacy Impact Assessment - Conduct privacy impact assessments.
Data Consent Management - Manage data consent.
Data Anonymization - Anonymize personal data.
Data Pseudonymization - Pseudonymize personal data.

Infrastructure and Virtualization Security Policy and Procedures - Establish, document, approve, communicate, apply, evaluate and maintain infrastructure and virtualization security policies and procedures.
Virtualization Security - Secure virtualization platforms.
Infrastructure Hardening - Harden infrastructure components.
Infrastructure Monitoring - Monitor infrastructure components.
Infrastructure Patching - Patch infrastructure components.
Infrastructure Configuration Management - Manage infrastructure configurations.
Infrastructure Access Control - Control access to infrastructure.
Infrastructure Segmentation - Segment infrastructure components.
Container Security - Secure container environments.
Serverless Security - Secure serverless environments.
Infrastructure Availability - Ensure infrastructure availability.
Infrastructure Capacity Planning - Plan infrastructure capacity.
Infrastructure Documentation - Document infrastructure components.
Infrastructure Testing - Test infrastructure components.
Security Incident Management Policy and Procedures - Establish, document, approve, communicate, apply, evaluate and maintain security incident management policies and procedures.
Incident Detection - Detect security incidents.
Incident Response - Respond to security incidents.
Incident Reporting - Report security incidents.
Incident Recovery - Recover from security incidents.
Incident Lessons Learned - Document lessons learned from incidents.
Incident Escalation - Establish incident escalation procedures.
Incident Testing - Test incident response procedures.
Security Incident Management Team - Establish a security incident management team.
